name: JAZARI — Developed By - HEYSHAM Softwares
description:
JAZARI is a powerful, self-hosted, plugin-based platform built with Python & Flask.
Start with a clean core and instantly expand it by uploading plugins — no coding required.
From AI agents and document automation to custom dashboards and real-time tools, JAZARI adapts to your exact needs.
Shipped as a single Docker image so you can run it locally or on any server in minutes.
